title: Script and Binary Execution

use_cases.name: Run Composer Script
flow: Developer invokes run-script with script name
RunScriptCommand validates script is not a reserved event (unless in scriptEvents list)
RunScriptCommand calls composer->getEventDispatcher()->hasEventListeners(ScriptEvent)
If no listeners: throws 'Script not defined' error
Sets COMPOSER_DEV_MODE env, optionally overrides ProcessExecutor timeout
Calls EventDispatcher::dispatchScript(scriptName, devMode, args)

use_cases.name: List Available Scripts
flow: RunScriptCommand::listScripts() fetches scripts via package->getScripts()
For each script, tries Application::find(name) to get description
Renders table of script names and descriptions to output

use_cases.name: Interactively Select Script
flow: RunScriptCommand::interact() fetches getScripts()
Prompts IO::select() with script names/descriptions
Sets selected script as input argument

use_cases.name: Execute Vendor Binary
flow: Developer provides binary name
ExecCommand::execute() calls dispatcher->addListener('__exec_command', binary)
Restores CWD to initialWorkingDirectory if changed by global command
Calls EventDispatcher::dispatchScript('__exec_command', true, args)

use_cases.name: List Vendor Binaries
flow: ExecCommand::getBinaries(forDisplay=true) globs bin-dir and merges with package->getBinaries()
Local binaries labeled with '(local)' suffix
Outputs list via IO::write()

use_cases.name: Invoke Script as Direct Command (Script Alias)
flow: ScriptAliasCommand registered dynamically per script entry in composer.json
Constructor receives script name, description, optional CLI aliases
execute() sets COMPOSER_DEV_MODE env
Calls EventDispatcher::dispatchScript(script, devMode, args, ['script-alias-input' => inputString])

use_cases.name: Dispatch Script Event
flow: Creates ScriptEvent(eventName, composer, io, devMode, additionalArgs, flags)
Calls doDispatch(event)
getListeners(event): merges registered listeners + getScriptListeners() from package->getScripts()
Checks COMPOSER_SKIP_SCRIPTS env to skip specific scripts
Pushes event to eventStack (detects circular calls)

use_cases.name: Execute PHP Class Method Handler
flow: makeAutoloader() sets up class autoloading
Validates class_exists and is_callable
Calls className::methodName(event)
false return maps to exit code 1

use_cases.name: Execute Shell Command
use_cases.trigger: Callable is a plain shell string (not @, not ::, not Command class)
flow: Appends additionalArgs to command string (or replaces @additional_args placeholder)
@putenv: sets/clears env var via Platform::putEnv / Platform::clearEnv
@php: prefixes with getPhpExecCommand(), resolves binary path via ExecutableFinder
Checks local package binaries for BinaryInstaller::determineBinaryCaller()
Executes via executeTty() (interactive) or process->execute() (non-interactive)

use_cases.name: Execute Nested Composer Script Reference
flow: @composer <args>: runs composer binary via PHP exec command (executeTty)
@scriptName: creates new ScriptEvent, calls dispatch(scriptName, scriptEvent) recursively
setOriginatingEvent() links child event to parent
ScriptExecutionException propagates up with error annotation

use_cases.name: Execute Command Class Handler
use_cases.trigger: Callable contains '\\', ends with 'Command', no spaces (isCommandClass)
flow: makeAutoloader() sets up class autoloading
Validates class extends Symfony Command
Rejects reserved Composer event names
Creates isolated Symfony Application, adds command, runs with StringInput
Reuses ConsoleIO output stream if available

key_relationships: EventDispatcher depends_on AutoloadGenerator (makeAutoloader for PHP scripts)
EventDispatcher reads Package::getScripts() for script listeners
ScriptAliasCommand registered_by Application (one per composer.json script)
key_data_structures: ScriptEvent(eventName, composer, io, devMode, additionalArgs, flags) — passed to all dispatched script handlers
listeners: array<eventName, array<priority, array<callable|string>>> — in-memory listener registry
skipScripts: list<string> — from COMPOSER_SKIP_SCRIPTS env var
flags['script-alias-input'] — raw CLI input string passed by ScriptAliasCommand to suppress output
important_notes: ExecCommand uses '__exec_command' as synthetic event name for binary execution
COMPOSER_SKIP_SCRIPTS env var can suppress specific script listeners
COMPOSER_DEBUG_EVENTS env var enables debug output per dispatched event
ProcessExecutor::setTimeout() can be overridden per run-script invocation via --timeout
EventDispatcher::ensureBinDirIsInPath() prepends bin-dir to PATH before every listener execution
Autoloader is rebuilt per script dispatch only when package set changes (sha256 hash check)
Circular script references are detected via eventStack and throw RuntimeException
ScriptAliasCommand ignoreValidationErrors() to allow pass-through of unknown args
